sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Latest LNC News - Lincoln National Corporation to Hold 2025 An...
feed.summary: This page provides news and analysis for Lincoln National Corporation (LNC), covering its insurance and retirement businesses. It includes recent announcements on financial results, product enhancements, strategic partnerships, and community initiatives. The company focuses on annuities, life insurance, group protection, and retirement plan services, often highlighting developments in these areas through various releases.

feed.title: Q4 2025 Kornit Digital Ltd Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Kornit Digital Ltd (KRNT) reported achieving all 2025 objectives, including revenue growth and a shift towards a recurring ARR model, with strong double-digit impression growth in Q4 and 11% for the full year. The company delivered Q4 revenues of $58.9 million and adjusted EBITDA of $5.5 million, meeting the upper end of guidance, while generating approximately $11 million in operating cash flow for the ninth consecutive quarter. However, non-GAAP gross margin slightly decreased, adjusted EBITDA was lower than the previous year, and the company projects low single-digit revenue growth for 2026 due to a strategic transition, alongside challenges in the direct-to-fabric market and negative foreign exchange impact.

feed.title: Expeditors International of Washington stock falls 1.01% as CBP postpones trade security summit
feed.summary: Shares of Expeditors International of Washington (EXPD) dropped 1.01% after U.S. Customs and Border Protection announced the postponement of the Trade and Cargo Security Summit to September 2026. The stock is currently trading at $141.22, below its 20-day and 50-day moving averages, indicating short-to-medium-term bearish momentum, though it remains above its 200-day moving average. Technical indicators suggest a high probability of further declines, with an expected trading range of $137.00 to $146.00 for the coming week.

feed.title: Can Itron (ITRI) Turn New AI Grid Partnerships Into a Durable Software-Led Moat?
feed.summary: Itron (ITRI) is strengthening its position in grid modernization through new AI-powered partnerships with Ausgrid and NVIDIA, aiming for higher-margin software and analytics. While these collaborations reinforce Itron's focus on grid-edge, AI-centric solutions, the company's investment narrative still faces the risk of project delays due to regulatory or customer factors. Despite potential hurdles, Simply Wall St projects significant revenue and earnings growth for Itron by 2029, suggesting a substantial upside to its current price.

feed.title: Fortive achieves perfect Corporate Equality Index rating but stock drops 1.62%
feed.summary: Fortive (FTV) announced its eighth consecutive perfect score on the HRC Foundation's Corporate Equality Index, highlighting its commitment to workplace inclusivity. Despite this achievement, the company's stock experienced a 1.62% drop to $53.92, largely due to bearish market momentum. Technical analysis indicates sustained short- and medium-term bearish pressure, with the stock trading below key moving averages and hinting at oversold conditions, suggesting a potential further decline unless a significant resistance level is surpassed.

feed.title: -1.68% for Essex Property Trust stock as selling intensifies and price nears 52-week low
feed.summary: Essex Property Trust (ESS) stock dropped 1.68% today, nearing its 52-week low of $238.54, with current trading at $239.61. Technical indicators suggest persistent bearish momentum across all timeframes, and the stock is considered oversold. Analysts anticipate sideways consolidation between $235 and $247 in the coming week, with a high probability of further downside given that all major indicators remain bearish.

feed.title: A Look At Genuine Parts (GPC) Valuation As Dividend Streak Faces Rising Cash Flow And Separation Risks
feed.summary: Genuine Parts (GPC) is facing questions regarding the sustainability of its 70-year dividend increase streak due to a free cash flow payout ratio above 100% and a planned corporate separation. Despite these concerns, Simply Wall St's analysis suggests GPC is undervalued with a fair value of $140.38 compared to its current trading price of $105.02, contingent on the successful execution of its business separation, cost savings initiatives, and margin expansion. Investors are advised to consider both the rewards and warning signs related to the company's future growth and risks.

feed.title: OLAY Breakthrough On Cell Adhesion Puts Procter & Gamble Beauty In Focus
feed.summary: OLAY, a key Procter & Gamble brand, has announced a scientific breakthrough on cell adhesion and skin aging, which is already integrated into its new product technology and established formulas. This development highlights P&G's focus on science-backed beauty, potentially enhancing OLAY's brand perception and P&G's overall beauty segment. Investors should monitor how this technology spreads, its pricing against competitors, and its impact on P&G's earnings, especially considering existing risks like competitive market and debt levels.

feed.title: Evergy stock consolidates as company highlights detailed safety work in line crew tweet
feed.summary: Evergy (EVRG) stock is consolidating near recent highs at $80.85, showing a bullish trend. The company highlighted its line crews' detailed safety work in a recent tweet. Technical indicators suggest a high probability of further price appreciation for EVRG, with an expected price range of $81.70–$82.50 for the coming week.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Co Stock: Dividend Reliability and Governance Challenges Ahead of 2026 Annual Meet
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive Co (ISIN: US1941621039) has announced its 63rd consecutive year of dividend increases, with a quarterly dividend of $0.53 per share, highlighting its defensive stability in the consumer staples sector. Despite this strong financial performance, the company faces brewing shareholder tensions regarding governance reforms ahead of its annual meeting on May 8, 2026. The article details Colgate-Palmolive's global brand strength, strategic focus on international expansion, and dividend reliability, while also addressing potential risks from commodity inflation, competition, regulatory scrutiny, and currency fluctuations.

feed.title: Cummins Inc. Stock: Engine Powerhouse Faces Energy Transition and Institutional Momentum in 2026
feed.summary: Cummins Inc. continues to attract institutional investors as it navigates the energy transition towards electrification and hydrogen while maintaining its core diesel engine business. The company's strategic investments in clean technologies and its robust service network position it as a resilient pick in volatile markets. Investors are closely monitoring its adaptation speed in new energy segments, alongside its traditional strengths in industrial manufacturing and power generation.

feed.title: Dow Inc. Stock: Navigating Chemical Sector Challenges Amid Geopolitical Tensions and Market Volatili
feed.summary: This analysis examines Dow Inc.'s position in the global chemicals industry, highlighting its resilient business model and strategic advantages amidst geopolitical tensions and market volatility. It delves into Dow's core operations across three segments, its competitive landscape, and macro-financial influences, offering insights for North American investors on growth catalysts and potential risks.

feed.title: PPG Industries Inc Stock: Stable Leader in Coatings Amid Sector Headwinds and Growth Outlook
feed.summary: PPG Industries Inc. (NYSE: PPG) is presented as a stable leader in the global coatings market with a defensive posture and cyclical upside. The company reaffirmed its FY 2026 EPS guidance of $7.70-$8.10, aligning with analyst consensus, making it an attractive option for North American value investors seeking industrial exposure. Despite sector headwinds, PPG's dual-segment business model, innovation in sustainable formulations, and global footprint suggest continued resilience and growth potential.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) launches AI companion Avery
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) has launched "Avery," an AI-powered conversational companion and personalized health assistant. Avery is designed to provide proactive, personalized health support, assisting individuals with tasks like locating care, managing appointments, and understanding benefits. This initiative aims to enhance the member experience and streamline interactions with healthcare services.

feed.title: Hilton Worldwide Expands Luxury Portfolio with Innovative Hotel Brands and AI-Driven Guest Experienc
feed.summary: Hilton Worldwide is expanding its luxury and lifestyle hotel offerings with over 20 new properties slated for 2026, integrating AI and technology for enhanced guest experiences, and targeting robust financial growth. The company reported strong 2025 results with adjusted EBITDA up 12% and maintains a strong financial position, making it an attractive option for North American investors. Hilton also focuses on sustainability through its 'Travel with Purpose' initiative, appealing to ESG-conscious capital.

feed.title: VICI Properties Inc Stock: Resilient REIT Leader in Gaming and Hospitality Real Estate Amid Market V
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc is a leading REIT specializing in gaming and hospitality properties, known for its stable income generation through long-term net leases with major tenants like Caesars Palace and MGM Grand. The company offers attractive yields and growth potential, maintaining a strong balance sheet and consistent dividend policy, making it appealing to dividend-focused and North American investors seeking resilient assets in the leisure economy. Despite recent market pressures, its strategic positioning and diversification efforts beyond traditional gaming assets underscore its strong fundamentals.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Provides the “Bear Case” for Paychex, Inc. (PAYX)
feed.summary: Jim Cramer discussed the "bear case" for Paychex, Inc. (PAYX) on Mad Money, acknowledging the company's strong fundamentals and recent performance but cautioning against it due to the current "macro morass" and potential economic slowing. Despite strong growth, a good acquisition, and a 4.6% dividend, Cramer argues that the slowing economy could push its P/E multiple lower and dividend yield higher, making it overvalued. He concludes that there is no immediate catalyst to align the stock’s valuation with the company’s underlying strength, leading him to advise against buying.

feed.title: What American International Group (AIG)'s AI-Driven Underwriting Partnership With McGill Means For Shareholders
feed.summary: American International Group (AIG) has partnered with McGill and Partners to utilize agentic AI and Palantir's Foundry platform for real-time underwriting and capacity deployment, covering up to US$1.60 billion in specialty Gross Premiums Written. This collaboration supports AIG's broader digital and AI-enabled underwriting initiatives, aiming to enhance risk selection and capacity deployment. While this move aligns with AIG's goal of improved combined ratios and protected margins, investors should also consider the potential interplay with rising catastrophe exposure and the company's long-term financial forecasts.

feed.title: Jefferies bullish on The Coca-Cola Company (KO) amid strong protein business outlook
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company (KO) is receiving a bullish outlook from Jefferies, primarily driven by the strong prospects of its protein business division. This positive assessment suggests potential growth and investor confidence in Coca-Cola's diversified portfolio beyond its traditional beverage offerings. Investors will likely be watching for developments in this segment as a key indicator of future performance.

feed.title: Limoneira Shareholders Back Board, Pay Plan and Auditor
feed.summary: Limoneira Co shareholders voted to re-elect Elizabeth Mora and Peter J. Nolan to the board of directors for three-year terms and approved the company's executive compensation program on an advisory basis. They also ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent auditor for the fiscal year ending October 31, 2026. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates LMNR as Neutral due to weak financial performance and bearish technical signals, partially offset by constructive earnings-call factors and a moderate dividend yield.

feed.title: Kymera Therapeutics Presents BroADen Study Data on KT-621 at AAD Annual Meeting
feed.summary: Kymera Therapeutics presented data from its BroADen study on KT-621 at the American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting. The presentation detailed the efficacy and safety profile of KT-621 as a potential treatment for dermatological conditions, showing positive patient outcomes and tolerability. These findings are significant for advancing therapeutic options for various skin-related disorders.

feed.title: Assessing Booking Holdings (BKNG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (BKNG) has seen a recent share price pullback, with negative returns across various short-term periods, despite positive long-term shareholder returns. The company is currently trading at US$4,062.14, which is reported to be at a 48% intrinsic discount to its fair value estimate of $5,465.03. This suggests a potential undervaluation based on its platform durability, margin-rich economics, and strong earnings trajectory, though risks like competition and travel slowdowns remain.

feed.title: Jefferies Bullish on The Home Depot (HD) Following Mingledorff Acquisition
feed.summary: Jefferies has maintained a "Buy" rating on The Home Depot (HD) following its acquisition of Mingledorff's, projecting a $100 billion expansion in the combined total addressable market. BNP Paribas also supports the acquisition but trimmed its price target and maintained a "Neutral" rating due to market decline and shrinking multiples. The acquisition is expected to enhance Home Depot's long-term earnings and growth in the HVAC distribution sector.

feed.title: Will Synchrony’s (SYF) Expanded Pet Insurance Partnerships Redefine Its Health and Wellness Financing Narrative?
feed.summary: Synchrony (SYF) has expanded its pet insurance partnerships by integrating with Figo Pet Insurance, allowing policyholders to pay vet bills with CareCredit and have reimbursements automatically credited. This move builds on existing partnerships with Pets Best and Pumpkin, deepening Synchrony's reach in pet health financing and reinforcing its health and wellness financing strategy. While this expansion enhances convenience, investors are advised to consider Synchrony's concentration in key retail partners and its financial forecasts, which project significant revenue and earnings growth by 2028.

feed.title: Costco bets big on gas amid rising prices
feed.summary: Amid rising gas prices driven by the Iran conflict and increased demand, Costco is intensifying its focus on fuel to attract and retain members. The warehouse club finds that low-priced gas is a significant driver for membership sales, as about half of gas customers also shop inside the warehouse. To further leverage this, Costco is expanding its gas operations by opening standalone gas stations, with the first expected by June in Mission Viejo, California, and another in Honolulu by 2027.

feed.title: Evercore Bullish on Union Pacific (UNP) Amid Strong Volume Growth and Robust Margins
feed.summary: Evercore has upgraded Union Pacific (UNP) to "Outperform" with a slightly raised price target, citing strong volume growth and robust margins. Analyst sentiment remains largely bullish, with a consensus price target suggesting a 14.74% upside. While a potential merger with Norfolk Southern creates some uncertainty, analysts believe the stock is attractive due to solid operational progress.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Launches AI Companion Avery
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) has launched "Avery," an AI companion designed to simplify healthcare tasks for members, including benefits navigation, appointment scheduling, and claims status. This initiative marks the company's use of generative AI directly with customers, rather than just for back-office functions. Avery is currently available to millions of members, with projections to expand to 20.5 million by year-end 2026, aiming to improve operational leverage and consumer retention by streamlining the healthcare experience.

feed.title: Analysts remain constructive on McDonald’s (MCD) following strong Q4 and full-year 2025 performance
feed.summary: This article discusses analysts' positive outlook on McDonald's (MCD) after its robust Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results. The strong performance has led experts to maintain a constructive stance on the company's stock.

feed.title: Jefferies Bullish on The Coca-Cola Company (KO) Amid Strong Protein Business Outlook
feed.summary: Jefferies analysts are bullish on The Coca-Cola Company (KO) due to the strong growth prospects of its fairlife protein business, which is expected to significantly contribute to North American organic sales over the next two years. The firm anticipates a 25% increase in fairlife supply and its expansion into new channels, forecasting that this will help Coca-Cola achieve its 5% top-line growth outlook, aligning with management's guidance. Despite this positive outlook, the article also notes that the firm suggests other AI stocks might offer greater return potential in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: Upcoming drug delivery talk sees West Pharmaceutical Services stock fall 1.92% amid weak technical signals
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) stock fell 1.92% amidst weak technical signals, coinciding with the upcoming presentation by Katie Falcone at the SAE Media Group PFS & Injectable Drug Devices East Coast Conference. Technical indicators suggest persistent selling pressure and a low probability of an upside move, with WST consolidating between $240.50 and $245.90. The stock is currently trading below its short and medium-term moving averages, pointing to potential further downside or sideways movement.

feed.title: NVR Inc. Stock: Unique Homebuilding Model Drives Steady Value Amid Housing Market Shifts
feed.summary: NVR Inc. stands out in the U.S. homebuilding sector with an asset-light strategy, focusing on high-margin single-family homes and minimizing land ownership risks. This approach leads to consistent profitability and superior inventory turnover compared to competitors. Despite market pressures like elevated mortgage rates, NVR's disciplined execution and focus on growing markets make it a compelling investment for North American investors seeking stability in the cyclical housing industry.

feed.title: Genuine Parts Co Stock: Strategic Business Split Positions Automotive and Industrial Segments for Independent Growth
feed.summary: Genuine Parts Co (GPC) plans to split its Automotive and Industrial businesses into two independent public companies over 9-12 months to enhance focus and shareholder value. This strategic move, announced post-Q4 2025 earnings, aims to better position each segment for growth in distinct market dynamics, with analysts like Raymond James's Sam Darkatsh seeing potential for increased valuation. The Automotive segment is resilient due to aftermarket demand, while the Industrial segment (Motion Industries) is poised for recovery and growth.

feed.title: Amgen's Repatha Cuts Risk Of First Major Cardiovascular Event By 31% In High-Risk Patients
feed.summary: Amgen's drug Repatha has been found to reduce the risk of a first major cardiovascular event by 31% in high-risk patients. This finding is significant for individuals prone to such events. The information was reported by Refinitiv.

feed.title: Bolthouse Investments, LLC's JPMorgan Ultra-Short Municipal Income ETF(JMST) Holding History
feed.summary: This article details Bolthouse Investments, LLC's historical holdings in the JPMorgan Ultra-Short Municipal Income ETF (JMST). As of December 31, 2025, Bolthouse Investments held 36,445 shares, valued at $1.86 million, representing 1.65% of their portfolio. The firm has made one purchase and two sales of JMST shares, resulting in an estimated gain of $3,238.31 (0.17%) on their current holdings.

feed.title: iShares MSCI Spain ETF (NYSE: EWP) - Share Price

It details the latest share price of $51.96, along with its movement over the past seven days and relative to the opening price. The article also includes comprehensive historical performance data, including yearly and financial year movements, and a daily share price history with open, high, low, close, volume, and daily movement figures.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines Captain Says “Mean Tweets” Got Him Fired — Just 644 Days Before Retirement [Roundup]
feed.summary: A senior Southwest Airlines captain was fired over "mean tweets" criticizing progressive cultural pressures, just 644 days before his mandatory retirement. The article also includes various other aviation-related news and social media posts, such as a retired DC-9 jet for sale, Porter Airlines' new points redemption surcharge, and a discussion about airfare pricing.

feed.title: Chevron Corp. stock: Integrated energy leader navigates oil market dynamics and strategic growth for
feed.summary: Chevron Corp., a major integrated energy company, is highlighted for its diversified operations in upstream, downstream, and renewables, offering resilient dividends to North American investors. The analysis emphasizes its disciplined capital allocation, strategic growth in LNG and carbon capture, and strong competitive position in the energy sector. Investors are advised to monitor oil prices, production updates, and dividend declarations, while being aware of risks like commodity price volatility and regulatory changes.

feed.title: Wisconsin DOT corridor modernization deal fails to lift Jacobs Solutions stock, which slips 2.80%
feed.summary: Jacobs Solutions' stock (J) fell by 2.80% despite the company undertaking key design roles for the Wisconsin DOT's I‑39/90/94 Corridor Modernization Program. Technical indicators show persistent bearish pressure, with the stock trading below its short, medium, and long-term moving averages, and momentum indicators reinforcing a strong bearish bias with oversold readings. The expected trading range for the next week is $123.50–$129.00, with a low probability of a meaningful price rebound, suggesting further downside is more likely.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Stock Rises as Investors Seek Safety While Dow Hits Correction
feed.summary: Coca-Cola (NYSE:KO) shares rose by 1.37% as investors sought refuge in consumer staples amidst a broader market downturn that saw the Dow Jones Industrial Average enter correction territory. Despite concerns about consumer spending and conservative guidance, Coca-Cola is executing on a consistent dividend hike and preparing for a leadership transition with Henrique Braun stepping in as CEO. The company's upcoming earnings report and annual meeting will be key for shareholders, balancing defensive appeal against current economic challenges.

feed.title: Prologis Inc. Stock: Leading Logistics REIT with Strong Analyst Support and Strategic Growth Initiatives
feed.summary: Prologis Inc. (PLD) maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts, supported by aligning earnings, a dividend increase, and a key joint venture with GIC. The company, a leading logistics REIT, benefits from booming e-commerce and strategic growth initiatives, positioning it as a stable investment. Investors are eyeing its strong market leadership and predictable rental income streams, making it a defensive play in equity portfolios.

feed.title: Coca-Cola CEO shares driving factor in sudden departure from company
feed.summary: Former Coca-Cola CEO James Quincey, and previously Walmart CEO Doug McMillon, cited the rise of artificial intelligence as a primary reason for their departures, stating that new leadership was needed to navigate the significant shifts AI brings. Their decisions sparked public debate, with some criticizing them for stepping down after pushing AI adoption, while others speculated about potential economic downturns as the true motivation. These events highlight growing concerns about AI's impact on employment, consumers, and the need for stronger regulations.

feed.title: Coherent Corp Stock: Leading Optics Innovation in AI and Data Center Expansion Amid Strong Market Positioning
feed.summary: Coherent Corp (ISIN: US19247G1076) is a leading innovator in optical technologies crucial for AI infrastructure, data centers, and telecommunications. The company specializes in silicon photonics, high-power lasers, and co-packaged optics, positioning it for significant growth in data-intensive applications. Despite execution and supply chain risks, Coherent is poised to benefit from surging AI infrastructure spending and the global expansion of fiber and 5G/6G networks.

feed.title: WisdomTree Interest Rate Hedged High Yield Bond Fund (NASDAQ:HYZD) Short Interest Down 34.0% in March
feed.summary: Short interest in WisdomTree Interest Rate Hedged High Yield Bond Fund (HYZD) decreased by 34.0% in March, falling to 13,621 shares. This represents a short-interest ratio of 0.4 days based on average trading volume. Shares of HYZD traded down 0.4% to $22.09, and institutional investors like LPL Financial LLC and UBS Group AG have either increased or initiated significant stakes in the fund.

feed.title: Did Index Inclusion Amid Expected EPS Decline Just Shift Lamb Weston’s (LW) Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings (NYSE: LW) was recently added to the Russell Small Cap Comp Value Index, but analysts anticipate a significant decline in its fiscal third-quarter 2026 earnings per share. This situation creates a complex investment narrative, as the increased visibility from index inclusion contrasts with impending earnings contraction and ongoing margin pressures. Investors are evaluating the company's cost savings and automation program as a potential offset to these challenges, while also considering diverse analyst perspectives on fair value.

feed.title: Salesforce, Inc. Stock: Core Business Strengths, AI Momentum, and Key Investor Considerations in 2026
feed.summary: Salesforce, Inc. (ISIN: US79466L3024) continues to be a dominant force in CRM software, driven by its robust AI innovations, including the Agentforce platform, and expanding cloud services. The article highlights Salesforce's pioneering SaaS model, strong financial health, and market leadership in the face of competition. It also outlines key investor considerations for North American investors in 2026, including potential risks like macroeconomic slowdowns and regulatory challenges.

feed.title: NIKE, Inc. Class B Trade Ideas — BVC:NKE
feed.summary: This article compiles various trading ideas and technical analyses for NIKE, Inc. (NKE) from multiple contributors on TradingView. Traders offer diverse perspectives ranging from short swing trades, options strategies ahead of earnings, long-term investment analyses considering Nike's brand strength and financial health, to bearish scenarios based on chart formations and macro technical findings. The discussions highlight potential entry/exit points, support/resistance levels, and risks associated with upcoming earnings reports and broader market conditions.

feed.title: APTIV PLC Revenue Breakdown – NYSE:APTV/I
feed.summary: This article provides a brief overview of APTIV PLC's revenue breakdown. Last year, the company generated $20.40 billion USD, with its Electrical Distribution Systems segment contributing the most at $8.81 billion USD. The United States was the largest regional contributor, accounting for $7.36 billion USD.

feed.title: Genuine Parts stock slips 0.25% as company ends X account and redirects to LinkedIn
feed.summary: Genuine Parts (GPC) stock slipped 0.25% today after the company deactivated its X (formerly Twitter) account and redirected followers to its LinkedIn page for updates. The stock trades below key moving averages, indicating persistent bearish momentum across all timeframes. Technical indicators suggest dominant selling activity, and the price is expected to range between $100.00 and $109.00 next week, with a high probability of further downward movement.

feed.title: Tesla Says Semi Battery Is 'Designed To Last A Million Miles'
feed.summary: Tesla has announced that the battery for its Semi truck is designed to last a million miles, directly addressing a major concern for electric trucking adoption related to vehicle lifespan and battery degradation. The company emphasizes the Semi's economic benefits, including lower operating costs and a nearly 20% lower total cost of ownership nationally, alongside advanced charging capabilities and improved aerodynamic efficiency. Despite past production delays, Tesla reports strong demand and significant real-world mileage logged by its test fleet, with efforts to integrate battery power for auxiliary functions to further reduce emissions and costs.
